name: passei-aki
description: Registra páginas acessadas e indica quando um link já foi visitado

scripts.start: npm run prepare:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist
scripts.build:chrome: npm run prepare:chrome && web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir dist --filename passei-aki-{version}_chrome.zip
scripts.build:firefox: npm run prepare:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir dist --filename passei-aki-{version}_firefox.zip
scripts.lint: npm run lint:firefox && npm run lint:chrome
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run prepare:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist
